message:
feat: Add typing module and fix bytes comparison crash

- Add runtime typing module with common types (Any, NoReturn, Never, Self,
  Union, Optional, List, Dict, Tuple, Callable, Generic, etc.)
- Fix bytes vs string comparison crash in comparison.zig - isStringConstant
  now only returns true for actual strings, not bytes
- Skip T/KT/VT imports from typing module to prevent local shadowing conflicts
- Skip 'main' import to prevent conflict with Zig entry point
- Add typing.zig to runtime files copy list in compiler.zig
- Register typing module with runtime.typing import path
